top_signals.title: NYT investigation alleges CFTC purged staff who questioned Trump-tied crypto firms
top_signals.summary: Two officials who intervened to help three firms win approvals over staff objections, per the NYT, have since taken jobs at MoonPay and Gemini Titan.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
